description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the mwallasch/docker-ruby-node Docker image and caching the node_modules/ directory. Define two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a test job that runs npm install, then npm run test:unit, and npm run test:app. In the deploy stage add a production job that only runs on the master branch, runs npm -v, npm install -qs, gem install dpl, and then uses dpl --skip_cleanup --provider=heroku --app=snake-pipeline with the $HEROKU_PRODUCTION_API_KEY to deploy to Heroku.
